docs.name: Body Bar with Krista
docs.description: Body Bar with Krista. Alternating Tuesdays and Wednesdays at 4:30pm. A total-body barbell workout using light to moderate weights and high reps. You’ll squat, press, curl and lunge your way through motivating music and coached technique. This class builds strength, tones muscle, and boosts endurance.
